name: Whisper Forest
short_description: Whisper Forest is a Japanese-style horror game where "Nesting creatures." lurks. Players collect Amulets and offer them to lanterns.
detailed_description:
Whisper Forest is a Japanese-style horror game where "Nesting creatures." lurks. Players collect Amulets and offer them to lanterns.

Recommended for:

Those who want to be scared

Those who want to be startled

First-time horror game player

Those who want to experience the sensation of wandering in the forest

Streamers known for their reactions

Story:

Fragments of a story unite in the "SukuuMono" series

Set on the outskirts of a town is the "Whisper Forest."

In that forest, a middle school girl has gone missing.

Undoubtedly, this is the work of "Nesting creatures."

Collect Amulets in the forest and offer them to lanterns to seal "Nesting creatures."

Features:

This game includes numerous frightening scenes.

Collect Amulets in the forest where "Nesting creatures." lurks and offer them to lanterns.

Play Time:

0.5 hour to 1.0 hours(Includes collection of all results)

Note: This game has a single ending, so please be aware.

All of Actor's games can be streamed without permission, but we would love for many people to know about and enjoy our games. If possible, when posting videos or streaming, we would appreciate it if you could introduce the store page! (Of course, this is not mandatory!)
